rules.cssText: .style_background__Ly973 { position: absolute; inset: 3.5rem 0px 0px; display: block; border-radius: 24px; background: rgb(248, 248, 250); content: ""; }
.style_dark__gg4Fo .style_background__Ly973 { border: none; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgb(18, 67, 253), rgb(223, 5, 218)); }

.style_dark__gg4Fo .style_background__Ly973::before { position: absolute; inset: 1px; display: block; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12), transparent), rgb(3, 11, 29); content: ""; }
.style_featureGrid__hkOdy .style_features__XrTNQ { grid-template-areas: "feature1 feature1 feature2" "feature3 feature4 feature4" "feature5 feature5 feature6"; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }

.style_featureGrid__hkOdy .style_features__XrTNQ.style_topRowIsSingleItem__6vbgJ { grid-template-areas: "feature1 feature1 feature1" "feature2 feature3 feature3" "feature4 feature4 feature5"; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
.style_templates__VSRYO { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.cursor_cursor__EDNTn::before { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }
.style_textPlusVisual__ukol8 { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }

.style_menu__DaNYf { position: fixed; top: var(--navigation-height); left: 0px; width: 100%; height: calc(100% - var(--navigation-height)); padding: calc(2.5rem - var(--links-gap)) 2.5rem; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(43, 42, 53); opacity: 0; overflow-y: scroll; pointer-events: none; }
.style_firstLevelMenu__1V5qT > .style_navigationItem__OF8W_ { display: flex; height: var(--navigation-bar-height); align-items: center; }
.style_secondLevelMenu__DznAH { overflow: hidden; height: 0px; opacity: 0; transition: height 0.2s ease-in-out, opacity 0.15s ease-in-out; visibility: visible !important; }

.style_navigationItem__OF8W_.style_mobileAccordionOpen__8_dkR .style_secondLevelMenu__DznAH { height: var(--content-height); opacity: 1; transition: height 0.2s ease-in-out, opacity 0.2s ease-in-out 0.1s; }

.style_secondLevelMenu__DznAH { position: fixed; top: calc(var(--navigation-height) - .25rem); right: 0px; left: 0px; display: grid; width: 70rem; margin: 0px auto; grid-template-columns: var(--delta-left) auto var(--delta-right); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s ease-in-out, visibility 0.2s ease-in-out; }

.style_secondLevelMenu__DznAH .style_secondLevelMenuContent__6Nuf5 { color: rgb(43, 42, 53); transform: perspective(300px) rotateX(-3deg); transform-origin: 50% 0px; transition: transform 0.2s ease-in-out; }

.style_secondLevelMenu__DznAH::after, .style_secondLevelMenu__DznAH::before { position: absolute; top: calc(var(--arrow-size) * -1); left: calc(var(--arrow-position) - var(--arrow-size)); display: block; width: 0px; height: 0px; border-right: var(--arrow-size) solid transparent; border-bottom: var(--arrow-size) solid #fff; border-left: var(--arrow-size) solid transparent; content: ""; }

.style_secondLevelMenuContent__6Nuf5 { position: relative; display: grid; padding: 1.875rem 2.5rem; border-radius: 12px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 0.25rem 1.875rem; gap: 2.5rem; grid-auto-flow: column; grid-column: 2; }
.style_footerBottom__0D_nZ { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; vertical-align: middle; }

.style_footerBanner__h16gQ.style_ptw__Zf9Ur { background: radial-gradient(closest-side, rgb(130, 56, 250), transparent) center bottom / 72.5rem 80% no-repeat, linear-gradient(transparent, rgb(130, 56, 250)); }
.style_section__fSkOn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.style_content__et1s7 { width: calc(50% + 1.25rem); max-width: 100%; flex: 0 0 auto; justify-content: center; padding: 2.5rem; }
.style_background__PKucF { right: 0px; left: 0px; width: calc(100% + var(--bodySideMargins) * -2); border-radius: 12px; margin-left: var(--bodySideMargins); }
